_DEMO: This is placeholder data — replace with your own. Any AI: see AGENTS.md → Onboarding.
_comment: The current hero mission. Swap this file to change the whole dashboard hero — header, countdown, one-thing, week planner, evidence. Nothing else hardcodes the mission. When you swap: snapshot this into archive/mission_<slug>.json first (see the mission-swap skill). 'slug' namespaces this mission's week/evidence checkbox keys so ticks never carry across mission swaps. This is demo-persona data for 'Alex Rivera'.

hero.kicker: Hero mission · one thing at a time
hero.title: 🚀 Operation Launch Week
hero.subtitle: Ship Fieldnotes to its first 50 beta users — calm, finished, real
hero.gatePassedMessage: You said you'd ship Fieldnotes to 50 beta users. Now the loop: onboard the first cohort, watch what they actually do, fix the top-3 friction points, and log every signup. Momentum beats polish — keep the daily block, keep it small.
hero.mission: Finished, not perfect. One block a day beats a weekend binge.

oneThing.do: Do today's single build block — one feature or one fix — and ship it.
oneThing.why: Open the launch checklist, do the block for today, tick it. One finished thing is the win. Don't open the whole backlog and spiral about everything left.
oneThing.reframe: A launch is a hundred small finished things, not one heroic weekend. You're not behind — you're building the machine that makes shipping ordinary.

hero.rule: ⏱️ This month's rule: every build day, one honest block beats a perfect plan. Did I ship one real thing today? If yes, that day counts. Always-OK: Sam · sleep · food · health · the day job.
hero.reframeStrip: Think once → Build → Measure → Improve. Shipped things are evidence. Log them, don't just plan them.

week.title: 🗓️ The 4-week arc — beta-ready by launch
week.sub: One theme per week. Deep, not broad. Tick as you go (saves on this device).

days.title: Week 1 · Core loop + onboarding
days.theme: The one flow a new user must love
items: Nail the capture → organize → recall loop
Dogfood it for a full day

days.title: Week 2 · Polish + performance
days.theme: Make it feel finished and fast

days.title: Week 4 · Launch + first cohort
items: Final QA pass on the core loop

evidence.title: 📦 Evidence by launch day
evidence.sub: These are wins. Tick them and mean it.
items: ✅ Core loop shipped + dogfooded a week
✅ Cohort 1 onboarded + first friction fixes logged
